title: Loyalty That Shocked the Crew
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on loyalty that shocked the crew within the Raizo Is Safe storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My LORD...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Momo?

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Whatcha mean "Father"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's right there, isn't he?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Please accept our humblest apologies!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Lord MOMONSURE! We are most embarrassed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Truly, it is as you say!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What AAA!?

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Duke!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: for the master to bow his head...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: could this child be...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: He is indeed LORD momonosuke. In every sense of the word.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Please forgive us for deceiving you all this while!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: In truth, Lord MOMONOSUKE and I are not father and son!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The child you see before you is...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The heir to the great Daimyo of Kuri of the Wano Kingdom, Lord Oden Kouzuki!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Lord MOMONOSUKE KOUZuki!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Wano Kingdom Daimyo of Kuri (heir) MOMONOSURE KOUZUKI

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The heir of the Kouzuki clan!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The son of Lord Oden!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Forgive us for not recognizing you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So Momo's some sorta bigshot or something?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Considering he's got these two as his retainers, it's safe to say he's an influential Lord.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: At any rate, for all of us, including Inuarashi and nekomamushi,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He is our Lord and Master!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: However, if his true identity were to be discovered during our travels, our enemies would but increase!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Thus, we pretended to be father and son!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We trusted you all, however the timing was never right for us to reveal the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So you aren't dad and kid!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They sure do look alike, though.

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Sorry for lying.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I am actually the son of a Daimyo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I dunno about your dad, but you're definitely a deviant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: A DaIMYO, I SAID!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Well, whatever.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What do you mean "whatever"? I do not appreciate your upping tone, luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is me caring! Big whoop, so you're some hot-shot lord or some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That doesn't mean we have to start acting differently you, dummy!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Lord MOMONO-SURE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: > You're afraid of heights, and you're a coward! Come on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A warrior does not know fear! Stop your slander-ing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Here they go again... He did save our lives, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A pirate knows not of deference to authority.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: leave him be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: For heavens sake, O-Nami! Luffy is a horrible person!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Awww. There there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Get away from her, Lord Mommonsuke! You little deviant...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Really ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Momo, my dear, if your daddy is a LORD,

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Then that means he must have treasure in his castle, right?()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hit the brakes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's not been more than a few months...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I guess these guys' exuberance will liven up the place a tad...

summary: Loyalty That Shocked the Crew: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
